prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7494名→7060名→6479名→7197名→7725名，整体呈先升后降再升的波动走势；2023年达到近年最低点6479名后连续 两年后移，2025年基准位次约7725名，较2024年后移约528名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为41人，2025年增至43人；2026年计划仍为43人，与2025年持平，未产生扩招或缩招的供需弹性影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第88名（2025年第8 6名），近年排名稳定在86–102区间，属于医药类专门院校中的头部高校；2025年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及理学院教师师德师风事件（微信性骚 扰学生），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第90位（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未见明显热度助推。历史投档异常记录中无该校 断档信号；药学为第五轮学科评估A+（全国顶尖），是该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业中药学类（含药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）、药学（拔尖创 新班）、临床药学等均直接对应药学A+学科，中药学类、生物制药等专业也与药学学科群高度关联，学科实力对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医药类专业 热度近年整体平稳偏热，临床医学、药学等方向持续推荐；天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人（含不确定标记），较2025年71938人增长约14%，竞争压力显著加大；省控线方 面，天津综合类本科批从2021年463分缓慢升至2025年476分，特殊类型招生控制线从579分降至562分，整体难度略有上升；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，非天津 本地高校；该校在天津招生计划占比较小（约43人），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜效应；天津考生对京沪及长三角高校偏好较强，药大所在区位对天津考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势（2023年后连续两年后移）、2026年招生计划持平、天津市考生总数大幅增加（+14%）带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度、以及软科 排名小幅下滑等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准7725名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约7805名，波动区间7305–8305名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 药学（拔尖创新班）
- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床药学
- 生物制药
- 化工与制药类（制药工程、食品营养与健康、环境科学）
- 生物医药数据科学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物统计学
- 中药学类（中药学、中药资源与开发、中药制药）
- 药事管理
- 生物技术
- 海洋药学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7305–8305名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（临床药学、生物制药、化工与制药类），一档专业（药学拔尖创新班、药学类）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（ 中药学类、生物技术、海洋药学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（7305名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌药学类专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 7494 → 7060 → 6479 → 7197 → 7725, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; after reaching a recent low of 6479 in 2023, it shifted backward for two consecutive years, with a baseline ranking of about 7725 in 2025, moving back about 528 places compared to 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin Comprehensive category was 41 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 43 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 43, unchanged from 2025, with no supply-demand elasticity impact from expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; it ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (86th in 2025), with stable rankings in the 86–102 range in recent years, making it a top-tier specialized medical university; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving a teacher ethics incident in the School of Science (WeChat sexual harassment of students), which may have a mild suppressive effect on some candidates' application psychology; its Douyin popularity ranking is 90th (rated as average), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant popularity boost. There is no record of admission anomalies such as gaps for this university; Pharmacy is rated A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation (top in the country), the only A- or above discipline at this university; admission majors such as Pharmacy (including Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry), Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class), and Clinical Pharmacy directly correspond to the A+ Pharmacy discipline, while majors like Traditional Chinese Pharmacy and Biopharmaceuticals are also highly related to the Pharmacy discipline group, with strong disciplinary strength attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of medical and pharmaceutical majors has been generally stable and slightly hot in recent years, with clinical medicine and pharmacy directions continuously recommended; the total number of college entrance exam takers in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000 (including uncertain markers), an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; regarding provincial control lines, the Tianjin Comprehensive undergraduate batch slowly rose from 463 in 2021 to 476 in 2025, while the special type admission control line dropped from 579 to 562, with overall difficulty slightly increasing; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local Tianjin university; its enrollment plan in Tianjin accounts for a small proportion (about 43 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect; Tianjin candidates have a strong preference for universities in Beijing, Shanghai, and the Yangtze River Delta, and the location of China Pharmaceutical University has some appeal to Tianjin candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of historical rankings (shifting backward for two consecutive years after 2023), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in the number of Tianjin candidates (+14%), the slight negative reputation suppressing popularity, and the slight decline in Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 7725. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7805, with a fluctuation range of 7305–8305.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Pharmacy
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Biomedical Data Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Biostatistics
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Traditional Chinese Pharmaceutical Manufacturing)
- Pharmaceutical Administration
- Biotechnology
- Marine Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7305–8305, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Clinical Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering), with Tier 1 majors (Pharmacy Top Innovation Class, Pharmacy) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Marine Pharmacy) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7305), focus on reaching for the top-tier Pharmacy majors.
